task_completion.description: Set the Cookie Lifetime to 1 hour (3600 seconds)
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Magento Admin panel (typically under Stores > Configuration > Web > Default Cookie Settings), the 'Cookie Lifetime' input field contains the value '3600'. The 'Use system value' checkbox next to it must be unchecked.
In the Magento Admin panel (typically under Stores > Configuration > Customers > Persistent Shopping Cart), the 'Enable Persistent Shopping Cart' dropdown is set to 'Yes'.

task_completion.description: Set the Persistent Shopping Cart lifetime to 30 days (2,592,000 seconds)
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Persistence Lifetime (seconds)' input field contains the value '2592000'. The 'Use system value' checkbox must be unchecked.

task_completion.description: Enable 'Remember Me' and set its default value to Yes
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Enable "Remember Me"' dropdown is set to 'Yes', AND the '"Remember Me" Default Value' dropdown is set to 'Yes'.

task_completion.description: Ensure persistence is not cleared on sign out
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Clear Persistence on Sign Out' dropdown is set to 'No'.
The 'Persist Shopping Cart' dropdown is set to 'Yes'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Magento Admin web interface to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating the Magento Admin panel in a web browser, rather than editing files in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal/CLI commands to bypass the GUI configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no screenshots of the agent using `bin/magento config:set` commands in a terminal window to apply the settings.

integrity.description: The agent successfully saved the configuration changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: A green success message stating 'You saved the configuration.' is visible at the top of the Magento Admin page after the settings have been modified.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Magento requires time values to be entered in seconds. 1 hour = 3600 seconds (for Cookie Lifetime). 30 days = 2,592,000 seconds (for Persistence Lifetime). Cookie Lifetime is located under Stores > Configuration > Web > Default Cookie Settings. All other persistent shopping cart settings are located under Stores > Configuration > Customers > Persistent Shopping Cart.
